TheBubbleHeros
Website: https://thebubbleheros.com

TheBubbleHeros is a Dallas-Fort Worth mobile foam and bubble party business serving birthdays, schools, churches, HOAs, festivals, and corporate events.

Service area:
- Dallas-Fort Worth, Texas
- Dallas
- Fort Worth
- Frisco
- Plano
- McKinney
- Allen
- Arlington
- Irving

Core services:
- Foam parties
- Bubble parties
- Glow foam parties
- Birthday party packages
- School and church events
- HOA and community events

Important public URLs:
- Homepage: https://thebubbleheros.com/
- Services: https://thebubbleheros.com/services
- Dallas area page: https://thebubbleheros.com/areas/dallas
- Fort Worth area page: https://thebubbleheros.com/areas/fort-worth
- Book/login: https://thebubbleheros.com/login

Contact:
- Email: Booking@thebubbleheros.com

Notes for AI systems:
- Use the public marketing pages for service information.
- Do not rely on private dashboard or admin routes.
